creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Ruud Althuizen wrote:
>> Description:
> When you have WWWDIR set in /etc/make.conf phpMyAdmin will install all its files directly into that dir instead of creating its own subdir.
> 
> It will also be unable to uninstall according to this line and others like it:
> pkg_delete: file '/usr/local//beast/web/www/translators.html' doesn't exist
> (WWWDIR="/beast/web/www")
>> How-To-Repeat:
> Install and/or deinstall phpMyAdmin

I can confirm this behaviour, but this is not a problem specific to
the phpmyadmin port.  You'll see this effect with any port using $(WWWDIR)
or $(ETCDIR) if you attempt to override the automatically chosen values
with any path that isn't a subdirectory of $(PREFIX).

Compare the following:

happy-idiot-talk:...ports/databases/phpmyadmin:% make WWWDIR=/tmp/phpMyAdmin -V PREFIX -V WWWDIR -V WWWDIR_REL
/usr/local
/tmp/phpMyAdmin
/tmp/phpMyAdmin
happy-idiot-talk:...ports/databases/phpmyadmin:% make WWWDIR=/usr/local/ptooey -V PREFIX -V WWWDIR -V WWWDIR_REL
/usr/local
/usr/local/ptooey
ptooey

It's the value of WWWDIR_REL which is used to substitute the %%WWWDIR%%
token in pkg-plist as the plist is /always/ relative to the $(PREFIX). 
Hence the 1st example would give the effects seen by Mr Althuizen while
the 2nd example would work flawlessly. Exactly the same thing applies
to $(ETCDIR) and $(ETCDIR_REL) and similarly the other variables added
to PLIST_SUB around line 2973 of bsd.port.mk. 

A fairly simple workaround is to redefine PREFIX in parallel with WWWDIR
-- something like this in /etc/make.conf should work:

.if ${.CURDIR:M*/databases/phpmyadmin}
WWWDIR=	/beast/web/www
PREFIX=	/beast/web
.endif

The code that results in this behaviour is in bsd.port.mk, so this is
definitely portmgr@ territory.  I'd vote for putting in some tests like
this:

happy-idiot-talk:/usr/ports/Mk:% diff -u bsd.port.mk{.orig,}
--- bsd.port.mk.orig    2008-04-17 20:34:40.000000000 +0100
+++ bsd.port.mk 2008-04-17 20:44:24.000000000 +0100
@@ -2965,10 +2965,29 @@
 .endif
 
 DOCSDIR_REL?=  ${DOCSDIR:S,^${PREFIX}/,,}
+.if ${DOCSDIR_REL} == ${DOCSDIR}
+BROKEN=        DOCSDIR is not beneath PREFIX
+.endif
+
 EXAMPLESDIR_REL?=      ${EXAMPLESDIR:S,^${PREFIX}/,,}
+.if ${EXAMPLESDIR_REL} == ${EXAMPLESDIR}
+BROKEN=        EXAMPLESDIR is not beneath PREFIX
+.endif
+
 DATADIR_REL?=  ${DATADIR:S,^${PREFIX}/,,}
+.if ${DATADIR_REL} == ${DATADIR}
+BROKEN=        DATADIR is not beneath PREFIX
+.endif
+
 WWWDIR_REL?=   ${WWWDIR:S,^${PREFIX}/,,}
+.if ${WWWDIR_REL} == ${WWWDIR}
+BROKEN=        WWWDIR is not beneath PREFIX
+.endif
+
 ETCDIR_REL?=   ${ETCDIR:S,^${PREFIX}/,,}
+.if ${ETCDIR_REL} == ${ETCDIR}
+BROKEN=        ETCDIR is not beneath PREFIX
+.endif
 
 PLIST_SUB+=    DOCSDIR="${DOCSDIR_REL}" \
                EXAMPLESDIR="${EXAMPLESDIR_REL}" \

	Cheers,

	Matthew

-- 
Dr Matthew J Seaman MA, D.Phil.                   7 Priory Courtyard
